mapper.insert:
SELECT COURSE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO COURSE ( COURSE_ID, CREATED_BY, CATEGORY_TYPE, COURSE_TYPE, COURSE_TITLE, DESCRIPTION, INSTRUCTOR_NAME, THUMBNAIL_URL, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{categoryType}, #{courseTypeValue}, #{courseTitle}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instructorName}, #{thumbnailUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE SET THUMBNAIL_URL = #{thumbnailUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE COURSE_ID = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ONLINE_COURSE ( COURSE_ID, COURSE_MATERIAL_URL, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{courseMaterialUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'OPEN' )

INSERT INTO OFFLINE_COURSE ( COURSE_ID, CAPACITY, LOCATION, STATUS, APPLY_START_DATE, APPLY_END_DATE, COURSE_START_DATE, COURSE_END_DATE ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{capacity}, #{location}, 'OPEN', #{applyStartDate}, #{applyEndDate}, #{courseStartDate}, #{courseEndDate} )

SELECT COURSE_CHAPTER_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO COURSE_CHAPTER ( CHAPTER_ID, COURSE_ID, CHAPTER_TITLE, CHAPTER_ORDER, AI_GENERATED_YN, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{chapterId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterTitle}, #{chapterOrder}, 'N', 'Y', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_CHAPTER SET VIDEO_URL = #{videoUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VIDEO_PATH = #{videoPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME = #{originalFileName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FILE_SIZE = #{fileSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DURATION_SECONDS = #{durationSeconds, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} AND COURSE_ID = #{courseId}
mapper.select: SELECT CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, CHAPTER_TITLE AS chapterTitle, CHAPTER_ORDER AS chapterOrder, VIDEO_URL AS videoUrl, VIDEO_PATH AS videoPath, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME AS originalFileName, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, DURATION_SECONDS AS durationSeconds, SUMMARY_TEXT AS summaryText, TRANSCRIPT_TEXT AS transcriptText, 0 AS progressRate, 0 AS lastPlaySeconds, 0 AS maxPlaySeconds, NULL AS quizAttemptId, NULL AS learningStatus, AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS AS quizBuildStatus FROM COURSE_CHAPTER WHERE COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CHAPTER_ORDER ASC

SELECT cc.CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, cc.COURSE_ID AS courseId, cc.CHAPTER_TITLE AS chapterTitle, cc.CHAPTER_ORDER AS chapterOrder, cc.VIDEO_URL AS videoUrl, cc.VIDEO_PATH AS videoPath, cc.ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME AS originalFileName, cc.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, cc.DURATION_SECONDS AS durationSeconds, cc.SUMMARY_TEXT AS summaryText, cc.TRANSCRIPT_TEXT AS transcriptText, NVL(cls.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) AS progressRate, NVL(cls.LAST_PLAY_SECONDS, 0) AS lastPlaySeconds, NVL(cls.MAX_PLAY_SECONDS, 0) AS maxPlaySeconds, cls.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ID AS quizAttemptId, cls.STATUS AS learningStatus, cc.AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, cc.QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS AS quizBuildStatus FROM COURSE_CHAPTER cc LEFT JOIN CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.CHAPTER_ID = cc.CHAPTER_ID AND cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID = #{courseLearningId} WHERE cc.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND cc.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY cc.CHAPTER_ORDER ASC

SELECT chapter_id FROM ( SELECT cls.chapter_id FROM CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE_CHAPTER cc ON cls.chapter_id = cc.chapter_id WHERE cls.course_learning_id = #{courseLearningId} AND cls.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED') AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(cls.updated_at, cls.started_at) DESC, cc.chapter_order DESC, cls.chapter_learning_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.course_type AS courseType, oc.status AS onlineStatus, ca.application_status AS applicationStatus, cls.course_learning_id AS courseLearningId, cc.chapter_id AS chapterId, chs.chapter_learning_id AS chapterLearningStatusId FROM COURSE c LEFT JOIN ONLINE_COURSE oc ON oc.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN COURSE_CHAPTER cc ON cc.course_id = c.course_id AND cc.chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.application_id = ( SELECT MAX(application_id) FROM COURSE_APPLICATION WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND application_status = 'APPROVED' ) LEFT JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.application_id = ca.application_id AND cls.status != 'CANCELED' LEFT JOIN CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS chs ON chs.course_learning_id = cls.course_learning_id AND chs.chapter_id = cc.chapter_id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT PS.SKILL_NAME FROM COURSE_SKILL CS JOIN SKILL S ON CS.SKILL_ID = S.SKILL_ID JOIN SKILL PS ON S.PARENT_SKILL_ID = PS.SKILL_ID WHERE CS.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND PS.SKILL_TYPE = 'CATEGORY' AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY PS.SKILL_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(PS.SKILL_NAME) DESC

SELECT ps.SKILL_ID AS parentSkillId, ps.SKILL_NAME AS parentSkillName, s.SKILL_ID AS skillId, s.SKILL_NAME AS skillName FROM SKILL ps JOIN SKILL s ON s.PARENT_SKILL_ID = ps.SKILL_ID WHERE ps.USE_YN = 'Y' AND s.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ps.SKILL_TYPE = 'CATEGORY' ORDER BY ps.SKILL_NAME, s.SKILL_NAME

SELECT CC.CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, CS.SKILL_ID AS skillId, CS.WEIGHT AS weight, CS.COVERAGE_LEVEL AS coverageLevel, CS.COVERAGE_REASON AS coverageReason, CC.DURATION_SECONDS AS durationSeconds FROM COURSE_CHAPTER CC JOIN CHAPTER_SKILL CS ON CC.CHAPTER_ID = CS.CHAPTER_ID WHERE CC.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND CC.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CC.CHAPTER_ORDER, CS.SKILL_ID
SELECT DISTINCT CC.COURSE_ID FROM COURSE_CHAPTER CC JOIN CHAPTER_SKILL CS ON CC.CHAPTER_ID = CS.CHAPTER_ID WHERE CC.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CC.COURSE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE_SKILL ( COURSE_SKILL_ID, COURSE_ID, SKILL_ID, WEIGHT, COVERAGE_LEVEL, COVERAGE_REASON ) VALUES ( COURSE_SKILL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{courseId}, #{skillId}, #{weight}, #{coverageLevel}, #{coverageReason} )
mapper.select: SELECT CA.APPLICATION_STATUS AS applicationStatus, CA.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, CLS.STATUS AS learningStatus, CLS.PROGRESS_RATE AS progressRate FROM COURSE_APPLICATION CA LEFT JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS CLS ON CA.APPLICATION_ID = CLS.APPLICATION_ID WHERE CA.APPLICATION_ID = ( SELECT MAX(APPLICATION_ID) FROM COURSE_APPLICATION WHERE COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED') )

SELECT c.course_id AS course_id, c.course_type AS course_type, CASE WHEN c.course_type = 'ONLINE' THEN onc.status WHEN c.course_type = 'OFFLINE' THEN ofc.status ELSE NULL END AS course_status, ofc.apply_start_date AS apply_start_date, ofc.apply_end_date AS apply_end_date, ofc.capacity AS capacity, ofc.current_applicant_count AS current_applicant_count, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM COURSE_CHAPTER cc WHERE cc.course_id = c.course_id AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' AND NVL(cc.quiz_build_status, 'PENDING') != 'COMPLETED' ) AS incomplete_quiz_build_count FROM COURSE c LEFT OUTER JOIN ONLINE_COURSE onc ON c.course_id = onc.course_id LEFT OUTER JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE ofc ON c.course_id = ofc.course_id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT c.course_id AS course_id, c.course_type AS course_type, ofc.status AS course_status, ofc.apply_start_date AS apply_start_date, ofc.apply_end_date AS apply_end_date, ofc.capacity AS capacity, ofc.current_applicant_count AS current_applicant_count FROM COURSE c INNER JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE ofc ON c.course_id = ofc.course_id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId} FOR UPDATE OF ofc.current_applicant_count
SELECT COURSE_APPLICATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE_APPLICATION ( application_id, user_id, course_id, application_status, application_type, applied_at, approved_at ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{applicationStatus}, #{applicationType}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT course_learning_id FROM ( SELECT cls.course_learning_id FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON cls.application_id = ca.application_id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} AND ca.course_id = #{courseId} AND ca.application_status = 'APPROVED' AND cls.status != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY ca.application_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS ( course_learning_id, application_id, user_id, course_id, progress_rate, started_at, completed_at, status, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{courseLearningId}, #{applicationId}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, 0, NULL, NULL, #{status}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS ( chapter_learning_id, course_learning_id, user_id, course_id, chapter_id, progress_rate, last_play_seconds, max_play_seconds, quiz_attempt_id, status, started_at, completed_at, updated_at ) SELECT CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{courseLearningId}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, 0, 0, 0, NULL, #{status}, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS cls WHERE cls.course_learning_id = #{courseLearningId} AND cls.chapter_id = #{chapterId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS SET status = #{status}, started_at = NVL(started_at, SYSDATE), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE course_learning_id = #{courseLearningId} AND status = 'NOT_STARTED'

UPDATE CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS SET status = #{status}, started_at = NVL(started_at, SYSDATE), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE course_learning_id = #{courseLearningId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND status = 'NOT_STARTED'
mapper.select: SELECT cls.course_learning_id AS courseLearningId, chs.chapter_learning_id AS chapterLearningId, cls.course_id AS courseId, cc.chapter_id AS chapterId, cc.duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, chs.last_play_seconds AS lastPlaySeconds, chs.max_play_seconds AS maxPlaySeconds, chs.progress_rate AS progressRate, chs.status AS status FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.application_id = cls.application_id JOIN COURSE c ON c.course_id = cls.course_id JOIN ONLINE_COURSE oc ON oc.course_id = c.course_id JOIN COURSE_CHAPTER cc ON cc.course_id = c.course_id AND cc.chapter_id = #{chapterId} JOIN CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS chs ON chs.course_learning_id = cls.course_learning_id AND chs.chapter_id = cc.chapter_id WHERE cls.user_id = #{userId} AND cls.course_id = #{courseId} AND ca.application_status = 'APPROVED' AND cls.status != 'CANCELED' AND c.course_type = 'ONLINE' AND NVL(oc.status, 'OPEN') = 'OPEN' AND cc.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS SET last_play_seconds = #{lastPlaySeconds}, max_play_seconds = GREATEST(max_play_seconds, #{maxPlaySeconds}), progress_rate = GREATEST(progress_rate, #{progressRate}), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE chapter_learning_id = #{chapterLearningId} AND status != 'COMPLETED'

UPDATE CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS SET last_play_seconds = #{lastPlaySeconds}, max_play_seconds = GREATEST(max_play_seconds, #{maxPlaySeconds}), progress_rate = GREATEST(progress_rate, #{progressRate}), status = #{status}, completed_at = NVL(completed_at, SYSDATE), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE chapter_learning_id = #{chapterLearningId}

UPDATE CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS SET quiz_attempt_id = NVL(quiz_attempt_id, #{quizAttemptId}), progress_rate = 100, status = #{status}, completed_at = NVL(completed_at, SYSDATE), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE chapter_learning_id = #{chapterLearningId}

UPDATE COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls SET status = #{status}, progress_rate = 100, completed_at = NVL(completed_at, SYSDATE), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE cls.course_learning_id = #{courseLearningId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COURSE_CHAPTER cc LEFT JOIN CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS chs ON chs.chapter_id = cc.chapter_id AND chs.course_learning_id = #{courseLearningId} WHERE cc.course_id = #{courseId} AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' AND NVL(chs.status, 'NOT_STARTED') != 'COMPLETED' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LEARNING_LOG ( log_id, course_learning_id, chapter_learning_id, user_id, course_id, chapter_id, event_type, play_seconds, progress_rate, event_at ) VALUES ( LEARNING_LOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{courseLearningId}, #{chapterLearningId}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{eventType}, #{playSeconds}, #{progressRate}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE OFFLINE_COURSE SET current_applicant_count = current_applicant_count + 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND current_applicant_count < capacity
mapper.select: SELECT application_id AS application_id, user_id AS user_id, course_id AS course_id, application_status AS application_status FROM COURSE_APPLICATION WHERE application_id = ( SELECT MAX(application_id) FROM COURSE_APPLICATION WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND application_status IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') ) FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_APPLICATION SET application_status = #{applicationStatus}, canceled_at = SYSDATE WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND application_status IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED')
UPDATE COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS SET status = #{status}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE OFFLINE_COURSE SET current_applicant_count = current_applicant_count - 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND current_applicant_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT c.COURSE_ID as courseId, c.COURSE_TITLE as courseTitle, c.COURSE_TYPE as courseType, c.CATEGORY_TYPE as categoryType, ca.APPLICATION_ID as applicationId, NVL(TO_CHAR(ca.APPLIED_AT, 'YYYYMM') || '-' || TO_CHAR(ca.APPLICATION_ID), '-') as applicationNo, cls.PROGRESS_RATE as progressRate, NVL(cls.STATUS, 'NOT_STARTED') as learningStatus, CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' ELSE '미완료' END as completionStatus, NVL( (SELECT LPAD(TO_CHAR(TRUNC(LAST_PLAY_SECONDS / 60)), 2, '0') || '분 ' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(MOD(LAST_PLAY_SECONDS, 60)), 2, '0') || '초' FROM ( SELECT LAST_PLAY_SECONDS FROM CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS WHERE COURSE_LEARNING_ID = cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC NULLS LAST, STARTED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), '0분 0초' ) as lastPlayTimeStr, NVL( (SELECT CHAPTER_ID FROM ( SELECT CHAPTER_ID FROM CHAPTER_LEARNING_STATUS WHERE COURSE_LEARNING_ID = cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC NULLS LAST, STARTED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), (SELECT CHAPTER_ID FROM ( SELECT CHAPTER_ID FROM COURSE_CHAPTER WHERE COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CHAPTER_ORDER ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) ) as nextChapterId FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE c ON cls.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON cls.APPLICATION_ID = ca.APPLICATION_ID WHERE cls.USER_ID = #{userId} AND cls.STATUS IN ('NOT_STARTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED') ORDER BY cls.STARTED_AT DESC, cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.COURSE_ID as courseId, c.COURSE_TITLE as courseTitle, TO_CHAR(cls.COMPLETED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as completedAtStr FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE c ON cls.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.USER_ID = #{userId} AND cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY cls.COMPLETED_AT DESC NULLS LAST ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.COURSE_TITLE as courseTitle, cc.CHAPTER_TITLE as chapterTitle, cc.CHAPTER_ORDER as chapterOrder, ll.EVENT_TYPE as eventType, ll.PROGRESS_RATE as progressRate, TO_CHAR(ll.EVENT_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as eventAtStr FROM LEARNING_LOG ll JOIN COURSE c ON ll.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_CHAPTER cc ON ll.CHAPTER_ID = cc.CHAPTER_ID WHERE ll.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ll.EVENT_AT DESC, ll.LOG_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT qa.ATTEMPT_ID as attemptId, qaa.QUIZ_ID as quizId, qa.COURSE_ID as courseId, c.COURSE_TITLE as courseTitle, qa.CHAPTER_ID as chapterId, cc.CHAPTER_ORDER as chapterOrder, cc.CHAPTER_TITLE as chapterTitle, NVL(( SELECT TRUNC(COUNT(CASE WHEN qa2.CORRECT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) FROM QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ANSWER qa2 WHERE qa2.ATTEMPT_ID = qa.ATTEMPT_ID ), 0) as score, q.QUESTION_TEXT as questionText, q.EXPLANATION as explanation, qo_sub.OPTION_TEXT as submittedOptionText, (SELECT qo_cor.OPTION_TEXT FROM QUIZ_OPTION qo_cor WHERE qo_cor.QUIZ_ID = q.QUIZ_ID AND qo_cor.CORRECT_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) as correctOptionText, TO_CHAR(qa.SUBMITTED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as submittedAtStr FROM QUIZ_ATTEMPT qa JOIN QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ANSWER qaa ON qa.ATTEMPT_ID = qaa.ATTEMPT_ID JOIN QUIZ q ON qaa.QUIZ_ID = q.QUIZ_ID JOIN COURSE c ON qa.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID JOIN COURSE_CHAPTER cc ON qa.CHAPTER_ID = cc.CHAPTER_ID LEFT JOIN QUIZ_OPTION qo_sub ON qaa.SELECTED_OPTION_ID = qo_sub.OPTION_ID WHERE qa.USER_ID = #{userId} AND qaa.CORRECT_YN = 'N' ORDER BY qa.SUBMITTED_AT DESC, qaa.ATTEMPT_ANSWER_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COURSE_ID) FROM ( SELECT qa.COURSE_ID FROM QUIZ_ATTEMPT qa JOIN QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ANSWER qaa ON qa.ATTEMPT_ID = qaa.ATTEMPT_ID WHERE qa.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY qa.ATTEMPT_ID, qa.COURSE_ID HAVING (COUNT(CASE WHEN qaa.CORRECT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100 / COUNT(*)) < 80 )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('NOT_STARTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED') AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ_ATTEMPT WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARNING_LOG WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ROWNUM = 1
